gempyor.inference¶

This module contains some functions related to inference simulation, but it primarily contains the GempyorInference class.

Classes

GempyorInference(config_filepath, run_id, prefix, first_sim_index, stoch_traj_flag, rng_seed, nslots, inference_filename_prefix, inference_filepath_suffix, out_run_id, out_prefix, path_prefix, autowrite_seir)

A class to encapsulate the process of inference simulation. Provides functionality for parameter inference, SEIR model execution, outcome computation, and inference optimization. config_filepath is the only non-optional parameter.

Public Methods of GempyorInference

.one_simulation(sim_id2write: int, load_ID: bool = False, sim_id2load: int = None, parallel: bool = False)

Oversees inference simulation, provides option to load previous simulation data as well.

.get_outcome_npi(load_ID: bool = False, sim_id2load = None, bypass_DF = None, bypass_FN = None)

Builds the NPI outcome modifiers. Returns an object that contains computed modifiers.

.get_seir_npi(load_ID: bool = False, sim_id2load = None, bypass_DF = None, bypass_FN = None)

Builds the SEIR NPI information. Returns an object that contains NPI parameters for the SEIR model.

.get_seir_parameters(load_ID: bool = False, sim_id2load = None, bypass_DF = None, bypass_FN = None)

Generates SEIR model parameters. Returns an array containing the drawn parameters.

.get_seir_parametersDF(load_ID: bool = False, sim_id2load = None, bypass_DF = None, bypass_FN = None)

Retrieves SEIR parameters and returns them as a pd.DataFrame.

.get_seir_parameter_reduced(npi_seir, p_draw = None, load_ID: bool = False, sim_id2load = None, bypass_DF = None, bypass_FN = None)

Retrieves and reduces SEIR model parameters and returns them as a pd.DataFrame.

gempyor
